notes: All files reside under expected writer-role directories: decisions/discovery/ (discovery), decisions/technical-discovery/ + contracts/original/ (technical-discovery), output/builders/builder-s{N}-1/ (builders), output/integration/ (integrator), state/coordinator/ (coordinator), state/sections/ (overseers), state/inline-deviations/ (overseers), audit/ (critic). No cross-writer contamination detected.

Scanned integrated artifact for all 10 Discovery OOS items: Spotify/streaming refs, lyrics/queue/history, album-art/pixmap/artwork, multi-user/cloud/auth, iPhone/iPad/iOS, persistent scrobbling/telemetry, theming/skinning, other StreamDock models, localization/i18n, rich playback controls. Zero hits in plugin source (excluding node_modules/ws which is the SDK transport library). The only network endpoints are ws://127.0.0.1:<port> (SDK socket) — no external destinations.

All canonical files present and well-formed: ledger-v1.json (restatement, 13 assumptions, 3 IPs, 10 OOS), sections-v1.json (prompt_verb_analysis with chosen_verb='display', 6 TD-IPs, 3 discovery_ip_resolutions, 13 MCAs, 18 DCAs, PNV.1, 6 sections with charter+acceptance+aa+depends_on+OOS, 6 contracts), 6 contract files, dag.json (7 nodes incl. integrator pseudo-node, 5 waves, all_verified=true), build-complete.json (signaled, deliverable_path set), 6 section state files (each with verification block), 2 inline-deviation files, dispatch-log.jsonl, history/log.jsonl, integration/manifest.json.

All 6 sections (S1-S6) have state files with status=='verified', verified_at timestamps, builders list, and per-AA verification entries. dag.json shows status=='verified' for each. Output files exist at output/builders/<name>/builder-s{N}-1/. Integrator wave verified with bundle assembled at output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/.

All 13 machine_checkable_assertions physically verified against integrated artifact: MCA.TDIPA.1 manifest.SDKVersion==2 [pass]; MCA.TDIPA.2 manifest.OS==[{Platform:'mac',MinimumVersion:'11.0'}] [pass]; MCA.TDIPA.3 manifest.CodePathMac=='plugin/run.sh' and file exists [pass]; MCA.TDIPB.1 Actions[0].Controllers==['Encoder'] [pass]; MCA.TDIPB.2 Encoder.layout=='layouts/nowplaying.json' and file exists [pass]; MCA.TDIPB.3 main.js / sdk.js emit setFeedback (not setImage) [pass — sdk.js:59]; MCA.TDIPB.4 layout items has key=='title' (type text) and key=='artist' (type text) [pass]; MCA.TDIPC.1 run.sh exec line invokes node against main.js and forwards $@ [pass]; MCA.TDIPC.2 plugin/node_modules/ws/package.json exists with name=='ws' (v8.20.1) [pass]; MCA.TDIPD.1 music_source.js spawns execFile('osascript',[...]) and parses tab-delimited stdout returning {title,artist} or null [pass]; MCA.TDIPD.2 all four literals present in music_source.js: 'application "Music"', 'player state', 'name of current track', 'artist of current track' [pass]; MCA.TDIPE.1 DEFAULT_POLL_MS==2000 in main.js [pass]; MCA.TDIPF.1 zero matches of /marquee|scrollOffset/ in plugin source [pass].

state/escalations/sev0-fixes/ is empty. No Sev 0 trivial fixes were recorded during the build. dev-002 (MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var) is logged as an inline-deviation, not as a Sev 0 record — see inline_deviation_audit check for related observation.

Every section's acceptance prose has multiple matching acceptance_assertions[] entries with from_acceptance_phrase tying back to specific clauses: S1=5 AAs covering folder-name, JSON parse + SDK-v2 keys, path resolution, Controllers, OS; S2=5 AAs covering layout items, truncation, PI HTML load, setSettings emission, payload-shape contract; S3=4 AAs covering registerPlugin handshake, willAppear/willDisappear lifecycle, touch/dial no-action-effect, sendFeedback shape; S4=5 AAs covering paint-on-data, null-placeholder, stop-on-disappear, settings-change cadence, showArtist; S5=4 AAs covering playing-state return shape, idle-returns-null, never-throws, four literals; S6=4 AAs covering edge_case_testing scenario coverage, PNV runs and passes, stub-boundary scope, machine-readable report. All 28 AAs run by harness with 28/28 passing.

detail: Discovery assumption_ledger items A1 (SDK shape), A3 (data source = local Apple Music), A4 (host OS = macOS), A9 (single-user/no-auth/no-telemetry) have NO assertion with covers field pointing to them. file_schemas.md table lists assumption_ledger[].assumption as coverage-required. 4 of 13 assumptions uncovered.

Discovery out_of_scope items at indices 1,2,3,4,7,8,9 are NOT pointed to by any covers field. Items uncovered: 'Lyrics display, queue display, or playback history'; 'Album art rendering (see IP2)'; 'Rich playback controls — skip, previous, scrub, like/dislike (see IP3)'; 'Multi-user, account, cloud sync, or remote control'; 'Persistent history of played tracks, scrobbling, or analytics/telemetry' (partial — out_of_scope/6 IS covered by DCA.OOS.TELEMETRY.1 which uses the 'analytics/telemetry' phrase, but the broader item also names persistent history); 'Theming/skinning system'; 'Support for other StreamDock hardware models'; 'Localization / i18n'. 7 of 10 OOS items uncovered.

prompt_verb_analysis.chosen_verb is coverage-required per file_schemas.md but no assertion has covers pointing to '.../prompt_verb_analysis/chosen_verb'. PNV.1 implicitly verifies it (verb_from_prompt='display') but does so via covers=ledger-v1.json#/restatement instead of pointing at chosen_verb. Functionally equivalent but schema-strict violation.

All 6 section charters are coverage-required per file_schemas.md but ZERO assertions point covers at any '.../sections/<i>/charter'. Charter prose for S1-S6 has no structured assertion derived from it. Acceptance is covered, but charter is the prior load-bearing claim of WHAT the section must do.

All section out_of_scope arrays are coverage-required per file_schemas.md but ZERO assertions point covers at any '.../sections/<i>/out_of_scope/<j>'. Total uncovered: 19 per-section OOS items across S1-S6. (Note: Discovery-level OOS items are partially covered by DCA.OOS.* assertions, but per-section OOS items are not.)

All 6 contract interface surfaces are coverage-required per file_schemas.md but ZERO assertions have covers pointing at any 'contracts/original/*.json'. Contracts C-S1-S2 (manifest references), C-S1-S3 (codepath entry), C-S2-S3 (PI settings), C-S2-S4 (feedback payload), C-S3-S4 (internal API), C-S4-S5 (music-source) are all uncovered by the covers-graph. The contract surfaces are exercised behaviorally by the harness (e.g., feedback payload shape verified by AA.S3.4, AA.S4.1) but no assertion's covers field points to a contract file.

Naming variance: file_schemas.md table names 'inflection_resolutions[].chosen_branch' as coverage-required, but sections-v1.json uses 'td_introduced_inflection_points[].default_branch' (since all 6 TD-IPs resolved via quick_reasoning without an inflection_resolutions block). All 6 default_branch values ARE covered by MCA assertions. Semantic coverage holds; schema-strict path-name match does not.

Both inline-deviations (dev-001, dev-002) are missing the explicit boolean fields changes_artifact, changes_contract, changes_assumption (per Critic charter audit rule). Their prose articulates equivalent claims: dev-001 says 'kept S1<->S2 binding intact' (i.e., changes_contract=false); dev-002 says 'contract_impact: None. C-S4-S5 is untouched' (i.e., changes_contract=false). nested_equivalent fields are articulated and plausible in both. dev-002 effectively adds code (MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE branch) to S5's artifact that is beyond the S5 charter — arguably changes_artifact=true, which would normally require a corresponding Sev 0 record per Critic charter rule. The deviation rationale (test-affordance, contract surface untouched) is reasonable but the strict-rule check flags it. No corresponding Sev 0 record exists in state/escalations/sev0-fixes/.
detail_dev_001: dev-001 category=charter_clarification; resolves PI path conflict by adopting contract value 'ui/inspector.html'. nested_equivalent: Overseer would have escalated to Coordinator who resolves in favor of contract. Plausible.
detail_dev_002: dev-002 category=implementation_path_chosen; adds MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var branch in music_source.js. Contract C-S4-S5 surface unchanged (getNowPlaying still returns {title,artist}|null). nested_equivalent: Overseer escalates; Coordinator approves as test-affordance. Plausible. Caveat: artifact strictly DID gain a code path, so changes_artifact=true under literal reading.
